hero.fileTitle: File:006 Toco toucan in Encontro das Águas State Park Photo by Giles Laurent.jpg
hero.alt: A beautiful portrait of a Toco Toucan in the wild
hero.caption: The Toco Toucan is a highly adapted species with unique behaviors.

habitat.alt: A Toco Toucan navigating its natural environment
habitat.caption: They make their home in diverse habitats where they can find shelter and thrive.

diet.alt: A Toco Toucan finding or consuming food
diet.caption: Finding food is a major part of the daily routine for a Toco Toucan.

baby.fileTitle: File:Toco toucan (Ramphastos toco) in flight composite.jpg
baby.alt: A young or baby Toco Toucan showing early development
baby.caption: Baby Toco Toucans must learn to survive and adapt from a young age.

family.alt: A group of Toco Toucans interacting with each other
family.caption: While often solitary, some Toco Toucans interact with others of their species.

range.alt: A Toco Toucan traveling across its geographic range
range.caption: Their geographic range covers various regions suited to their survival.

size.caption: The size of a Toco Toucan can vary depending on its age and environment.
